inputs.label: Inductance (L)
inputs.businessContext: Inductance of the circuit coil or inductor in Henries.

businessContext_i18n.en: Inductance of the circuit coil or inductor in Henries.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Devre bobini veya indüktörünün Henry cinsinden endüktansı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Induktivität der Spule oder Drossel in Henry.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Inductance de la bobine ou de l'inducteur du circuit en Henry.
businessContext_i18n.es: Inductancia de la bobina o inductor del circuito en Henrios.
businessContext_i18n.ar: محاثة الملف أو الملف الكهربائي في الدائرة بوحدة هنري

inputs.label: Capacitance (C)
inputs.businessContext: Capacitance of the circuit capacitor in Farads.

businessContext_i18n.en: Capacitance of the circuit capacitor in Farads.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Capacité du condensateur du circuit en Farads.
businessContext_i18n.es: Capacitancia del condensador del circuito en Faradios.
businessContext_i18n.ar: سعة المكثف في الدائرة بوحدة الفاراد.

inputs.label: Resistance (R)
inputs.businessContext: Series resistance in Ohms (for series RLC circuit). For parallel, use appropriate conversion.

businessContext_i18n.en: Series resistance in Ohms (for series RLC circuit). For parallel, use appropriate conversion.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ohm cinsinden seri direnç (seri RLC devresi için). Paralel için uygun dönüşümü kullanın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Serienwiderstand in Ohm (für Serien-RLC-Schaltung). Für Parallelschaltung entsprechende Umrechnung verwenden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Résistance série en Ohms (pour circuit RLC série). Pour parallèle, utiliser la conversion appropriée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Resistencia en serie en Ohmios (para circuito RLC serie). Para paralelo, use la conversión adecuada.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المقاومة المتسلسلة بالأوم (لدائرة RLC متسلسلة). للتوازي، استخدم التحويل المناسب.

inputs.label: Resonant Frequency (f₀)
inputs.businessContext: Measured or known resonant frequency in Hertz.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured or known resonant frequency in Hertz.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hertz cinsinden ölçülen veya bilinen rezonans frekansı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gemessene oder bekannte Resonanzfrequenz in Hertz.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fréquence de résonance mesurée ou connue en Hertz.
businessContext_i18n.es: Frecuencia de resonancia medida o conocida en Hertz.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تردد الرنين المقاس أو المعروف بالهرتز.

inputs.label: Bandwidth (BW)
inputs.businessContext: Half-power bandwidth of the resonance in Hertz.

businessContext_i18n.en: Half-power bandwidth of the resonance in Hertz.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Rezonansın yarı güç bant genişliği, Hertz cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Bande passante à mi-puissance de la résonance en Hertz.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ancho de banda de media potencia de la resonancia en Hertz.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عرض النطاق عند نصف القدرة للرنين بالهرتز.
